# fake_credentials.txt — intentionally contains fake credential patterns for testing
# This file is in tests/fixtures/ which is exempt from release-sanitize.sh scanning.
# DO NOT use any of these values outside of tests.

FAKE_OPENAI_KEY=sk-proj-FakeKeyForTestingOnly1234567890abcdef
FAKE_ANTHROPIC_KEY=sk-ant-api01-FakeKeyForTesting1234567890abcdefghij
FAKE_GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_FakeGitHubPersonalAccessToken12345678
FAKE_AWS_KEY=AKIAFAKEAWSACCESSKEYID1
FAKE_PRIVATE_KEY_HEADER=-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
